arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Jurgen Klopp's secret job agreement as Diogo Jota reaches Porto deal
arts.sum: Jurgen Klopp's move to Red Bull came as a shock to Liverpool supporters, but the legendary German manager has actually been planning for his next role for years

arts.ttl: Wojciech Szczesny opens up on process behind Barcelona move, reveals reasoning behind Juventus exit
arts.sum: Wojciech Szczesny is settling into life as a Barcelona player. Last week, his arrival was confirmed after La Liga gave their approval, and as things stand, he would be able to make his debut immediately after the international break. Szczesny came out of retirement to join the La Liga leaders.
